# Telnyx and Iterable Partner for Global Messaging - Iterable

## Telnyx and Iterable Partner for Global Messaging

**Published by**

January 1, 2020

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/telnyx-partnership-announcement.png)

Iterable customers now have access to reliable, carrier-direct SMS and MMS in over 200 countries
